## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX to discuss ongoing content projects and integration efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages: 9 published, \~30 in client review. Publishing process to be streamlined after 10 more manual reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [SEO content: "What is Composable Commerce" article approved with minor edits. More listicles for geo-targeting in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [New integration guide draft completed for gated membership using Stripe, Firebase, and Cloudflare workers.](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Analytics access for integration pages pending; Webflow team to provide appropriate access via their analytics team.](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Status

  - [9 published, \~30 in client review](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Publishing process:](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [Currently manual, \~15/week](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Plan to streamline after 10 more manual reviews](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Will mark unreviewed but published content for future review](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Categories need cleanup; some may not align with original intent](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)

### Analytics Access for Integration Pages

  - [Webflow team to provide appropriate analytics access](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Colin to contact relevant team for carved-out analytics view](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Aim: Monitor metrics like bounce rates to improve content](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### SEO Content Progress

  - ["What is Composable Commerce" article approved with minor edits](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Geo-targeting listicles: Some ideas approved, articles being generated](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Content can be published on main blog; dev blog will act as a filtered view](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### New Integration Guide: Gated Membership

  - [Draft completed using Stripe, Firebase, and Cloudflare workers](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Approach: High-level explanations without extensive code snippets](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Separate guides planned for Outseta and MemberStack integrations](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Team sees potential for scaling this type of content](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Current guide more manually crafted, using AI for research and writing assistance](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Team exploring ways to scale production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Potential for video content in the future, though limited by resources (2 people for video)](https://fathom.video/share/4ywfkSd7PCCcotiJcAh36TdxB8AUdhmx?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
